hero.name: Andrea D'Arpa
hero.gameHint: Click or press Space to jump

items.description: Development of legislative workflow platforms for Public Administrations.
highlights: Architected and developed the core backend of a legislative workflow platform
Designed and implemented a full set of REST APIs using .NET and C#
Developed complex SQL queries and stored procedures to automate legislative data processing pipelines
Designed relational database schemas compliant with the Akoma Ntoso legislative standard
Collaborated on the design and development of citizen-facing consultation portal interfaces
Managed infrastructure provisioning and deployment using Terraform
Worked extensively with Microsoft Azure (Portal and Azure DevOps) for cloud resource management and CI/CD workflows
Implemented Azure Logic Apps to create automated notification pipelines integrated with Microsoft Teams
Designed event-driven workflows triggered by database events, processing application context and dispatching contextual notifications

items.description: Project Manager and Lead Developer for Legal Tech platforms.
highlights: Led full-stack design and development of next-generation legal drafting software (government-funded research project)
Designed and managed XML-based non-relational databases using XQuery
Developed Akoma Ntoso–compliant consultation portals and semantic parsers in PHP
Owned the full project lifecycle including system architecture, technical decisions, and delivery
Managed international stakeholders and English-speaking clients
Lead developer on the project that won the Chamber of Deputies public call for proposals

items.description: Research in Legal Tech focused on Akoma Ntoso legislative drafting systems, usability for non-technical users, and automated legal markup through NLP-based pattern recognition.

items.degree: MSc in Computer Science – Systems and Networks
highlights: Thesis: full-stack web platform for legislative drafting and automatic legal markup (Simplex, Akoma Ntoso)
IoT project: smart litter box with sensors, MQTT messaging, Python backend, and Angular + Grafana monitoring dashboard
ML/NLP: movie similarity analysis using IMDb plot summaries
Big Data Analysis: music popularity prediction using cosine similarity and the Spotify API

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Selected projects and research work in Legal Tech and software engineering.

items.title: Simplex Project
items.description: Web platform for managing Akoma Ntoso legislative documents, developed for BitNomos and used as my MSc thesis project.

items.title: AI Plugin on LEOS
items.description: AI-powered plugin designed to improve statutory reference discovery and navigation in LEOS legislative drafting software.

items.title: FAO Document Portal
items.description: Document consultation portal for FAO legislative and institutional documents developed at the University of Bologna.

items.title: FAO Document Editor
items.description: Legislative drafting editor for FAO documents based on the Akoma Ntoso standard, developed at the University of Bologna.

items.title: Chamber of Deputies
items.description: Backend architecture and query layer enabling simultaneous consultation across four XPath-based legislative databases with a unified search interface.

items.title: Albania Portal
items.description: Legislative document consultation portal developed for the Albanian government at the University of Bologna.
